2606.22263.title: Revelio: Cost-Efficient Agentic Memory Safety Vulnerability Detection For Repository-Scale Codebases
2606.22263.paper_summary: Memory safety vulnerabilities remain a significant threat even for projects with extensive fuzzing and manual auditing. Recent results suggest that large language models hold great promise for detecting such vulnerabilities, but they are unreliable, at risk of hallucination, and challenging to scale to repository-size codebases. This paper presents Revelio, a cost-efficient end-to-end agentic framework for memory-safety vulnerability discovery. Revelio addresses the problem of hallucination by generating an executable Proof-of-Vulnerability, which is checked with a deterministic sanitizer. It reduces cost using inexpensive LLMs and lightweight static analysis to help generate and rank vulnerability hypotheses, reporting vulnerabilities only when they can be reproduced and confirmed by a sanitizer. We evaluated Revelio on seven production-quality projects that had been continuously fuzzed for five to eight years, as well as on 100 randomly selected Arvo projects from the CyberGym benchmark. With around one hour per project and a total cost of $300, Revelio discovered 19 previously unknown memory-safety vulnerabilities. On benchmarks, Revelio outperformed frontier coding agents across diverse backbone models at comparable token costs. Our results suggest that Revelio enables scalable and trustworthy end-to-end LLM-based memory-safety vulnerability detection.
2606.22263.paper_summary_zh: 記憶安全漏洞仍然是即使對於經過廣泛模糊測試和手動審計的專案來說，仍然是一個重大威脅。最近的研究結果表明，大型語言模型在檢測這類漏洞方面具有很大的潛力，但它們不可靠，存在幻覺風險，並且難以擴展到儲存庫大小的代碼庫。本文提出了Revelio，一個成本效益高的端到端代理框架，用於發現記憶安全漏洞。Revelio通過生成可執行的漏洞證明來解決幻覺問題，該證明會通過確定性清理器進行檢查。它使用廉價的LLM和輕量級靜態分析來降低成本，以幫助生成和排名漏洞假設，僅在漏洞可以被重現並由清理器確認時報告漏洞。我們在七個持續模糊測試五到八年的生產質量專案上評估了Revelio，還在CyberGym基準中隨機選取的100個Arvo專案上進行了評估。每個專案大約花費一小時，總成本為300美元，Revelio發現了19個先前未知的記憶安全漏洞。在基準測試中，Revelio在可比較的標記成本下超越了各種骨幹模型的前沿編碼代理。我們的結果表明，Revelio實現了可擴展且可靠的端到端基於LLM的記憶安全漏洞檢測。
2606.22263.author: Yiwei Hou et.al.
2606.22263.authors: Yiwei Hou, Hao Wang, Muxi Lyu, Marius Momeu, Eric Nguyen, Taige Yang, Koushik Sen, Dawn Song, David Wagner
